tiktok.keyChanges: TikTok's algorithm now prioritizes authenticity and creativity over engagement metrics, giving more weight to videos that spark genuine conversations and interactions. It also looks at the overall health of your account, including factors like comment sections and user feedback.
editingTips: Keep your videos concise and under 3 minutes
Experiment with vertical video formats for optimal viewing
Incorporate text overlays and captions for accessibility
Utilize TikTok's exclusive effects and filters to elevate your content
postingTips: Post consistently to maintain a consistent aesthetic and keep your audience engaged
Experiment with different posting times to reach a broader audience
Post during peak hours (3-5 pm EST) for optimal engagement
Space out your posts to avoid overwhelming your audience
Use TikTok's built-in scheduling tool to plan and schedule your content in advance
titleTips: Craft attention-grabbing titles that showcase your unique perspective (max 5 words)
Use action verbs like 'Get ready for' or 'Experience the'
Ask questions or make a bold statement to encourage engagement
Include relevant hashtags to increase discoverability
Keep it concise and clear, avoiding unnecessary words
descriptionTips: Use a conversational tone to connect with your audience
Include a clear CTA (call-to-action) to drive engagement
Keep your descriptions concise and scannable
Use relevant keywords to improve discoverability
Add a touch of personality and humor to make your content stand out
summaries: Boost engagement with authentic, creative content
TikTok's algorithm favors videos that spark conversations
Use vertical format and catchy music for success
Post consistently and experiment with posting times for growth

instagram.keyChanges: The Instagram algorithm now prioritizes content that sparks meaningful interactions and drives engagement. This includes likes, comments, saves, and shares. The algorithm also considers context and intent, such as when a user is searching for a specific product or service. Additionally, Instagram now uses a more nuanced approach to ranking content, taking into account factors like relevance, timeliness, and user behavior.
editingTips: Use high-quality, visually appealing images and videos.
Utilize Instagram's editing features, such as filters and effects, to enhance the visual appeal of your content.
Add text and captions to provide context and make your content more engaging.
Experiment with different editing styles and aesthetics to stand out from the crowd.
postingTips: Post content at times when your audience is most active and engaged, such as during peak hours (e.g. 12pm-4pm EST) or during major events and holidays.
Experiment with different posting frequencies to find what works best for your audience, but aim for at least 3-5 posts per week.
Consider using Instagram's features, such as IGTV and Reels, to mix up your content and keep your audience engaged.
titleTips: Use attention-grabbing, descriptive titles that accurately reflect the content of your post.
Keep titles concise and easy to read, ideally under 5 words.
Use relevant keywords and hashtags in your titles to improve discoverability.
Experiment with different title formats, such as questions or statements, to keep your audience engaged.
descriptionTips: Use descriptive and engaging captions that provide context and encourage interaction.
Keep descriptions concise and easy to read, ideally under 125 words.
Use relevant keywords and hashtags in your descriptions to improve discoverability.
Experiment with different description formats, such as stories or questions, to keep your audience engaged.
summaries: Boost engagement with interactive Instagram Stories
Maximize reach with timely and relevant content
Stand out with visually stunning Instagram Reels
Grow your audience with Instagram's features and tools
